languages.text: {n}Себериан безмолвно наблюдает, как его дочь теряет сознание, одурманенная сильнейшими препаратами. Разряд Движущей Силы вспыхивает в бионическом глазу предка, и из-под стыка феррум санктум с живой плотью просачивается капля машинного елея.{/n}

{n}Seberian watches in silence as his daughter loses consciousness, stupefied by the potent medicaments. A surge of the Motive Force flashes in his bionic eye, and a drop of machine oil seeps from the juncture where the Ferrum Sanctum meets living flesh.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Себериан безмолвно наблюдает, как его дочь теряет сознание, одурманенная сильнейшими препаратами. Разряд Движущей Силы вспыхивает в бионическом глазу предка, и из-под стыка феррум санктум с живой плотью просачивается капля машинного елея.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian watches in silence as his daughter loses consciousness, stupefied by the most potent drugs. A surge of the Motive Force flashes in his bionic eye, and a drop of machine oil seeps from the juncture where the ferrum sanctum meets living flesh.{/n}

{n}Seberian watches in silence as his daughter loses consciousness, stupefied by the most potent drugs. A surge of the Motive Force flashes in his bionic eye, and a drop of machine oil seeps from the juncture where the ferrum sanctum meets living flesh.{/n}

{n}Seberian watches in silence as his daughter loses consciousness, stupefied by the most potent drugs. A surge of the Motive Force flashes in his bionic eye, and a drop of machine oil seeps from the juncture where the Ferrum Sanctum meets living flesh.{/n}

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安沉默地看着女儿在强效药物的作用下失去意识，陷入昏迷。他仿生眼中闪过一道源力的激流，一滴机油从钢铁圣所与血肉相接的缝隙中渗了出来。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian watches in silence as his daughter loses consciousness, stupefied by the potent medicaments. A surge of the Motive Force flashes in his bionic eye, and a drop of machine oil seeps from the juncture where the Ferrum Sanctum meets living flesh.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安沉默地看着女儿在强效药物的作用下失去意识，陷入昏迷。他仿生眼中闪过一道源力的激流，一滴机油从钢铁圣所与血肉相接的缝隙中渗了出来。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberian observa en silencio cómo su hija pierde el conocimiento bajo el influjo de la poderosa medicación. Una descarga de Fuerza Motriz destella en su ojo biónico y una gota de aceite para máquinas brota de la junta donde el ferrum sanctum se junta con la carne viva.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian watches in silence as his daughter loses consciousness, stupefied by the potent medicaments. A surge of the Motive Force flashes in his bionic eye, and a drop of machine oil seeps from the juncture where the Ferrum Sanctum meets living flesh.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian observa en silencio cómo su hija pierde el conocimiento bajo el influjo de la poderosa medicación. Una descarga de Fuerza Motriz destella en su ojo biónico y una gota de aceite para máquinas brota de la junta donde el ferrum sanctum se junta con la carne viva.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberian observe en silence sa fille perdre connaissance, engourdie par les puissants narcotiques. Un flot de Force Motrice illumine son œil bionique, et une goutte d'huile de machine s'échappe de la jointure entre le Ferrum Sanctum et la chair.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian watches in silence as his daughter loses consciousness, stupefied by the potent medicaments. A surge of the Motive Force flashes in his bionic eye, and a drop of machine oil seeps from the juncture where the Ferrum Sanctum meets living flesh.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian observe en silence sa fille perdre connaissance, engourdie par les puissants narcotiques. Un flot de Force Motrice illumine son œil bionique, et une goutte d'huile de machine s'échappe de la jointure entre le Ferrum Sanctum et la chair.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberian, güçlü ilaçlarla sersemlemiş kızının bilincini kaybetmesini sessizce izliyor. Biyonik gözünde Devinim Gücü dalgası parlıyor ve Demir Kutak'ın canlı etle birleştiği yerden bir damla makine yağı sızıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian watches in silence as his daughter loses consciousness, stupefied by the potent medicaments. A surge of the Motive Force flashes in his bionic eye, and a drop of machine oil seeps from the juncture where the Ferrum Sanctum meets living flesh.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian, güçlü ilaçlarla sersemlemiş kızının bilincini kaybetmesini sessizce izliyor. Biyonik gözünde Devinim Gücü dalgası parlıyor ve Demir Kutak'ın canlı etle birleştiği yerden bir damla makine yağı sızıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberian sieht zu, wie seine Tochter unter dem Einfluss der starken Medikamente das Bewusstsein verliert. Ein Funke Antriebskraft flammt in seinem bionischem Auge auf und ein Tropfen Maschinenöl sickert aus der Stelle, an der das Ferrum sanctum auf lebendiges Fleisch trifft.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian watches in silence as his daughter loses consciousness, stupefied by the potent medicaments. A surge of the Motive Force flashes in his bionic eye, and a drop of machine oil seeps from the juncture where the Ferrum Sanctum meets living flesh.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian sieht zu, wie seine Tochter unter dem Einfluss der starken Medikamente das Bewusstsein verliert. Ein Funke Antriebskraft flammt in seinem bionischem Auge auf und ein Tropfen Maschinenöl sickert aus der Stelle, an der das Ferrum sanctum auf lebendiges Fleisch trifft.{/n}

languages.text: {n}セベリアンは娘が強力な薬物で意識を失うのを静かに見守る。彼の義眼に動機が閃き、聖鉄が生肉と接する部分から機械油が滲み出す。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian watches in silence as his daughter loses consciousness, stupefied by the potent medicaments. A surge of the Motive Force flashes in his bionic eye, and a drop of machine oil seeps from the juncture where the Ferrum Sanctum meets living flesh.{/n}
